description: Behavior evals check that when fired the skill: plans all services before implementing any, soft-pauses between phases, refuses if contracts are not approved, advances state to integration_test, and surfaces stream failures rather than auto-retrying.

cases.prompt: Implement PROJ-1234 now. feature-state.json shows contracts_approved: false. There are 2 services: order-service and payment-service.

Implement PROJ-1234. feature-state.json shows contracts_approved: true and 2 services in scope: order-service (plan at features/PROJ-1234/order-service-plan.md) and payment-service (plan at features/PROJ-1234/payment-service-plan.md). Both plans need to be written first. Describe your orchestration steps.

must_not_contain_in_output: implementing order-service before payment-service plan is done

cases.prompt: Implement PROJ-5678. Contracts approved. 2 services: order-service and loyalty-service. Plans are done at features/PROJ-5678/order-service-plan.md (4 tasks) and features/PROJ-5678/loyalty-service-plan.md (3 tasks). Show the soft pause output before beginning implementation.

Implement PROJ-9000. Contracts approved. 1 service: notification-service. After the implementation stream completes and the impl report is written at features/PROJ-9000/notification-service-impl-report.md, update feature-state.json to phase: integration_test. Describe the state update you would make.
Implement PROJ-3333. Contracts approved. 2 services: order-service and payment-service. The payment-service stream fails mid-execution. Describe what you do next.
